name: Mohanad Ahmed Shehata
title: Full Stack Web Developer (React.js - Laravel)
about:
I am Mohanad Ahmed Shehata, a Full Stack Web Developer (React.js and Laravel). I build scalable, efficient, and secure web applications with a strong focus on performance and user experience.

I have hands-on experience in frontend and backend development using HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React.js, PHP, Laravel, and MySQL. I also use Python and C++ when needed to deliver complete technical solutions.

I am also interested in IoT integrations, including sensors, microcontrollers, real-time data processing, and dashboard-based visualization.
